title: gladiolus punctatus
intro: Gladiolus punctatus is a species of cormous perennial plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the spotted gladiolus. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its root, which contains alkaloids, saponins, and glycosides that possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus punctatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the dried root often being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
